title: LEONARDO Desire Aroma White and Glass Heart Wax Melt and Oil Warmer
features: Coated in White for that lovely neat look
With a lovely heart cut out opening for placing one tea light candle
Suitable for creating that soothing aroma in personal spaces or room.
Approx. Product Dimensions: L12x W11x H12 cm
description: A stunning Borosilicate Glass Wax Melt Warmer and Oil Burner with a lovely heart cut out opening. PLEASE NOTE: It is recommended to have this place in non-flammable surfaces or with heatproof coasters for safety measures.
